service.label: Our Service
service.title: Services
service.desc: Aoki Design Studio provides end-to-end web production support for SMBs and sole proprietors — from design to development and operations.
service.lp.title: Landing Page
service.lp.desc: We create conversion-focused landing pages that maximize the appeal of your products and services.
service.corporate.title: Corporate Site
service.corporate.desc: We build sophisticated corporate websites that enhance your brand's credibility and trust.
service.wordpress.title: WordPress Build
service.wordpress.desc: We build CMS-powered sites that your team can update independently, with training and documentation included.
service.ec.title: E-Commerce Style Site
service.ec.desc: Sales-focused sites with product listings, cart, and checkout flows — designed and developed end to end.
pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Pricing Plans
pricing.desc: Choose from 3 plans that best suits your needs. Use the simulator for a detailed estimate.
usecase.label: Use Case
usecase.title: Who is this for?
usecase.desc: Click the option closest to your situation to jump directly to the best plan.
works.label: Works
works.title: Our Work
works.desc: A selection of websites we have created for our clients.
works.card1.title: 〇〇 Construction Co. Official Website
works.card1.desc: Revamped the brand image of a local SMB construction company. Strengthened recruitment and portfolio pages, achieving 2.4× more inquiries.
works.card2.title: Luxury Beauty Lotion Landing Page
works.card2.desc: Expressed brand value through a Noir × Gold luxury design. Improved CVR from 1.8% to 4.2%.
works.card3.title: Select Shop E-Commerce Site
works.card3.desc: Implemented product listing, cart, and wishlist features. Mobile-optimized to achieve 65% mobile sales ratio.
works.card4.title: Local Tutoring School — Easy-to-Update Site
works.card4.desc: Designed for staff to update freely via WordPress. Blog, announcements, and instructor profiles are all self-managed.
testimonials.label: Testimonials
testimonials.title: Client Testimonials
testimonial1.body: "The estimate simulator let me understand costs upfront, which made it easy to move forward. The finished site exceeded my expectations, and we've seen more inquiries coming in."
testimonial1.name: M.T.
testimonial2.body: "They handled our urgent request carefully and professionally. The design sensibility is excellent — they created a site that perfectly matched our brand image."
testimonial2.name: K.S.
testimonial3.body: "We can now update the site ourselves via WordPress and have integrated our SNS accounts. The post-delivery support was thorough — we're really glad we chose them."
testimonial3.name: A.Y.
faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
booking.label: Booking
booking.title: Schedule a Free Consultation
booking.desc: Check availability on Calendly and book your slot instantly. Duration: 30–45 min via Zoom or Google Meet.
contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Free Consultation Form
contact.desc: Please share your requirements based on the estimate simulator results.
form.name: Full Name
form.message.placeholder: Please describe your project (e.g. We are considering a website redesign. Our current site uses WordPress...)
form.privacy: I agree to the Privacy Policy
form.note: We will contact you within 2 business days.
form.recaptcha: This form is protected by reCAPTCHA.
confirm.title: Please Review Your Input
confirm.desc: Please confirm the details below and click "Submit" to send.
success.title: Your message has been received!
success.message: Thank you for reaching out. A confirmation email has been sent to the address you provided. We will contact you within 2 business days.
error.title: Submission Failed
error.message: We apologize for the inconvenience. An error occurred during submission. Please try again later or contact us directly by email.
